meta.title: Period Calculator — Predict Your Next Period & Fertile Days | Health Calculators
meta.description: Predict your next periods and fertile windows. Enter your cycle length and period duration, plan 6 cycles ahead. Free, instant, no sign-up.

period.title: Period Calculator
period.description: Predict your next periods and identify your fertile windows based on your cycle.
period.howItWorksText: This calculator uses the calendar method: your next period starts after your cycle length. Ovulation occurs approximately 14 days before your next period. The fertile window spans the 5 days before ovulation and ovulation day itself.
